name: StandardApi

unions.name: Comparison
unions.comment: The `Comparison` type is used for making comparinsons in a predicate.

unions.name: Direction
unions.comment: The `Direction` type is used to order a query.

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { url : Url.Url, headers : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, format : String.String, version : String.String }

aliases.name: Limit
aliases.comment:
The `Limit` type for limiting the results of a query. If the value is
`Nothing`, the default value is used (which may be unlimited). If the value is
a `Just x`, then the limit will be x.

aliases.name: Offset
aliases.comment:
The `Offset` type is for offseting the results of a query. If the value is
`Nothing`, there will be no offset (the same as `Just 0`). If the value is
a `Just x`, then the offset will be x.

aliases.name: Order
aliases.comment:
The `Order` type is used to order a query. It is represented as a list
containing a tuple with the name of the colum and the direction to order.

aliases.name: Predicate
aliases.comment:
A `Predicate` is a list of comparisons to be used when building a query. If
this were SQL, it would be the part the `WHERE` portion.

values.name: bool
values.comment:
Set a `predicate`, where the value is a `Bool`, of a query parameter to send
to a StandardAPI Server.
values.type: List.List String.String -> StandardApi.Predicate Basics.Bool -> List.List Url.Builder.QueryParameter

values.name: errorToString
values.comment: Convert a `Error` into a `String` that is nice for debugging.

values.name: float
values.comment:
Set a `predicate`, where the value is a `Float`, of a query parameter to
send to a StandardAPI Server.
values.type: List.List String.String -> StandardApi.Predicate Basics.Float -> List.List Url.Builder.QueryParameter

values.name: int
values.comment:
Set a `predicate`, where the value is a `Int`, of a query parameter to send
to a StandardAPI Server.
values.type: List.List String.String -> StandardApi.Predicate Basics.Int -> List.List Url.Builder.QueryParameter

values.name: iso8601
values.comment:
Set a `predicate`, where the value is a `Posix` that is represented as a
ISO8601 string, of a query parameter to send to a StandardAPI Server.
values.type: List.List String.String -> StandardApi.Predicate Time.Posix -> List.List Url.Builder.QueryParameter

values.name: limit
values.comment: Set the `limit` of a query parameter to send to a StandardAPI server.

values.name: offset
values.comment: Set the `offset` of a query parameter to send to a StandardAPI server.

values.name: order
values.comment:
Set the `order` of a query parameter to send to a StandardAPI server.

    order [] [ ( "created_at", Desc ) ]

values.name: predicate
values.comment:
Set the `predicate` (the where clause) of a parameter to send to a
StandardAPI server.
values.type: (a -> String.String) -> List.List String.String -> StandardApi.Predicate a -> List.List Url.Builder.QueryParameter

values.name: request
values.comment:
Create a HTTP request to a StandardAPI enpoint.

    import Url exposing (Protocol(..))

    config =
        { url =
            { protocol = Https
            , host = "example.com"
            , port_ = Nothing
            , path = ""
            , query = Nothing
            , fragment = Nothing
            }
        , headers = [ ( "Api-Key", "token") ]
        , timeout = Just 20
        , format = "application/json"
        , version = "0.1.0"
        }

    request config
        { method = "GET"
        , headers = []
        , path = "/posts"
        , body = emptyBody
        , msg = ReceivedPosts
        , decoder = list postDecoder
        , tracker = Nothing
        }
values.type: StandardApi.Config -> { method : String.String, headers : List.List Http.Header, path : String.String, body : Http.Body, msg : Result.Result StandardApi.Error a -> msg, decoder : Json.Decode.Decoder a, tracker : Maybe.Maybe String.String } -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: requestTask
values.comment: Just like [`request`](#request), but it creates a `Task`.
values.type: StandardApi.Config -> { method : String.String, headers : List.List Http.Header, path : String.String, body : Http.Body, resolver : Http.Resolver x a } -> Task.Task x a

values.name: schemaRequest
values.comment: Request the `Schema` from a StandardAPI resource.
values.type: StandardApi.Config -> { msg : Result.Result StandardApi.Error StandardApi.Schema.Schema -> msg, tracker : Maybe.Maybe String.String } -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: string
values.comment:
Set a `predicate`, where the value is a `String`, of a query parameter to
send to a StandardAPI Server.
values.type: List.List String.String -> StandardApi.Predicate String.String -> List.List Url.Builder.QueryParameter

name: StandardApi.Parser

values.name: bool
values.comment: Decode a `Bool` query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

values.name: custom
values.comment:
A custom decoder so you can decode other types of
a [`Predicate`](StandardApi#Predicate).

The [`iso8601`](#iso8601) for example is implemented like the follwing:

    iso8601 : List String -> Parser (Predicate Posix)
    iso8601 =
        custom (Iso8601.toTime >> Result.toMaybe)
values.type: (String.String -> Maybe.Maybe a) -> List.List String.String -> Url.Parser.Query.Parser (StandardApi.Predicate a)

values.name: float
values.comment: Decode a `Float` query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

values.name: int
values.comment: Decode a `Int` query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

values.name: iso8601
values.comment:
Decode a `Posix` query parameter, represented as a ISO8610 date string, of a
StandardAPI query.

values.name: limit
values.comment: Decode a [`Limit`](StandardApi#Limit) query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

values.name: offset
values.comment: Decode a [`Offset`](StandardApi#Offset) query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

values.name: order
values.comment: Decode a [`Order`](StandardApi#Order) query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

values.name: string
values.comment: Decode a `String` query parameter of a StandardAPI query.

name: StandardApi.Schema

aliases.name: Column
aliases.type: { type_ : String.String, default : Maybe.Maybe String.String, primaryKey : Basics.Bool, null : Basics.Bool, array : Basics.Bool, comment : String.String }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { columns : Dict.Dict String.String StandardApi.Schema.Column, comment : String.String }

aliases.name: Route
aliases.type: { path : String.String, method : String.String, model : Maybe.Maybe StandardApi.Schema.Model, array : Basics.Bool, limit : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Schema
aliases.type: { comment : String.String, models : Dict.Dict String.String StandardApi.Schema.Model, routes : List.List StandardApi.Schema.Route }

values.name: columnDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON value into a `Column`.

values.name: modelDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON value into a `Model`.

values.name: schemaDecoder
values.comment: Decode a JSON value into a `Schema`.
